_note: PLACEHOLDER — перегенерировать через scripts/regen-long-oi-profile.mts с реальным LLM-ключом перед F2b
coreIdea: Enter long on crypto futures after a ≥10% price dump in ~20 minutes, wait for bounce confirmation (rising price action + OI growth + prior long liquidations), take partial profit at +3.5% and full exit at +5%, with a hard stop at -12% and a 180-minute time exit.
unknowns: Exact candle count or momentum threshold for bounce confirmation
Precise OI growth rate threshold to distinguish genuine recovery from noise
Whether averaging is volume-weighted or equal-size adds

profile.coreIdea: Enter long on crypto futures after a ≥10% price dump in ~20 minutes, wait for bounce confirmation (rising price action + OI growth + prior long liquidations), take partial profit at +3.5% and full exit at +5%, with a hard stop at -12% and a 180-minute time exit.
profile.summary: The strategy monitors for sharp price drops of ≥10% over a ~20-minute window on crypto futures. Once a dump is detected the instrument enters a 'watch' phase rather than entering immediately. Entry is triggered only when three conditions align: price begins to recover (e.g., two consecutive green candles or a fast bounce), open interest starts growing again (signalling new long money), and the dump was preceded by long liquidations (confirming forced selling is likely exhausted). After entry, the first take-profit (TP1) closes 50% of the position at +3.5% and moves the stop-loss to break-even. The remaining position targets +5% (TP2). A hard stop-loss at -12% limits downside. If neither TP nor stop is hit within 180 minutes the position is closed by time. The strategy allows up to two averaging-down entries if price falls a further ~3% from the last entry price and a new bounce confirmation appears.
entryConditions: Price has dropped ≥10% within the last ~20 minutes (dump detection, watch phase activated)
Price begins rising: at least two consecutive green candles or a rapid bounce from the local low
Open interest is growing again (new demand entering the market)
Long liquidations occurred before or during the dump (forced sellers likely exhausted)
exitConditions: TP1: close 50% of position at +3.5% from entry, move stop to break-even
TP2: close remaining 50% at +5% from entry
Hard stop-loss: close entire position at -12% from entry
Time-based exit: close position if still open after 180 minutes

parameters.name: dumpPct
parameters.description: Minimum price drop over the observation window to trigger watch phase

parameters.name: windowMin
parameters.description: Lookback window in minutes for detecting the initial price dump

parameters.name: tp1Pct
parameters.description: First take-profit level as % gain from entry; closes 50% of position

parameters.name: tp2Pct
parameters.description: Second take-profit level as % gain from entry; closes remaining position

parameters.name: stopPct
parameters.description: Hard stop-loss as % loss from entry

parameters.name: timeoutMin
parameters.description: Maximum time in minutes to hold a position before forced exit

parameters.name: avgDownTriggerPct
parameters.description: Additional price drop from last entry that qualifies for averaging down

parameters.name: maxAvgDowns
parameters.description: Maximum number of averaging-down additions allowed

profile.watchLifecycleSummary: On dump detection the instrument enters a watch phase. No position is opened immediately. The watch phase monitors for bounce + OI recovery + liquidation evidence before allowing entry. If no confirmation appears the watch expires passively.
profile.positionManagementSummary: Entry at confirmation. TP1 closes 50% at +3.5% and promotes stop to break-even. TP2 closes remainder at +5%. Up to two additional entries (averaging down) are allowed if price drops ~3% from last entry and a new reversal confirmation appears.
profile.riskManagementSummary: Hard stop at -12% from entry. Time-based forced exit at 180 minutes. Break-even stop activated after TP1. Maximum two averaging-down adds limit compounding loss.
unknowns: Exact candle count or momentum threshold for bounce confirmation
Precise OI growth rate threshold to distinguish genuine recovery from noise
Whether averaging is volume-weighted or equal-size adds
evidence: «если за последние примерно 20 минут цена падает на 10% или больше, я не вхожу сразу, а беру инструмент на наблюдение и жду отскок»
«Вход делаю только после подтверждения: цена начинает расти, например появляются две зелёные свечи или быстрый bounce, open interest снова растёт, и перед этим были long-ликвидации»
«первый тейк на +3.5% — там фиксирую половину позиции. После TP1 стоп переношу в безубыток. Остаток держу до +5%»
«Если за 180 минут позиция не дошла ни до тейка, ни до стопа, закрываю по времени»
«Если после входа цена ещё падает примерно на 3% от последней цены входа, но потом снова появляется подтверждение разворота, могу усредниться. Всего максимум две доливки»
